matchingDescription: UK Stocks and Shares ISA - commission-free stock trading, fractional shares, no account fees, FSCS protected. Suitable for UK investors building a long-term equity portfolio.

variants.text: The FCA estimates UK retail investors paid over £1.2bn in trading commissions in 2022. Trading 212 charges zero commission on stocks and ETFs, with no account fees, making it one of the lowest-cost platforms for active equity investors.

HMRC data shows fewer than 30% of UK adults fully utilise their £20,000 annual ISA allowance. Trading 212's Stocks and Shares ISA holds a globally diversified portfolio from £1, with no account fees and FSCS protection up to £85,000.

Over 60% of S&P 500 stocks trade above £100 per share, historically limiting retail access to diversification. Trading 212 offers fractional shares from £1 across 10,000+ stocks and ETFs, enabling full portfolio construction at any investment size.

The Investment Association reports average UK fund charges of 0.75% annually. Trading 212's Stocks and Shares ISA holds ETFs with ongoing charges as low as 0.07%, a cost difference worth £680 per year on a £100,000 portfolio.

The Financial Services Compensation Scheme has paid out over £1bn to investors since 2001, covering losses if an authorised firm fails. Trading 212 is FSCS protected up to £85,000 per eligible claimant, with client assets held separately from company funds.
